name: Double Treat Toffee
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Pecans, finely chopped and toasted, divided
recipeInstructions:
-------------
Combine sugar, butter, and water in a 3-quart saucepan.
Cook over low heat, stirring gently, until sugar dissolves. Cover and cook over medium heat for 2 to 3 minutes to wash down sugar crystals from the sides of the pan.
Uncover and cook to hard crack stage (300 degrees). Remove from heat and stir in vanilla. Pour into a greased 15-inch x 10-inch x 1-inch jellyroll pan, quickly spreading mixture to edges of pan.
Sprinkle 1-1/2 cups chocolate morsels over toffee; let stand for 1 minute or until chocolate begins to melt. Spread chocolate evenly over candy. Sprinkle with 1 cup chopped pecans. Let candy set.
Place remaining 1-1/4 cups chocolate morsels in the top of a double boiler; bring water to a boil. Reduce heat to low and cook until chocolate melts. Remove from heat. Run a sharp knife around the edge of toffee in jellyroll pan.
Carefully invert toffee onto a wax paper-lined cookie sheet. Spread melted chocolate over uncoated side of toffee. Sprinkle with remaining 1 cup chopped pecans. Let set.
Break toffee into pieces. Store in an airtight container. Yield: 2 pounds.
